name: PhilateLister stamp catalog
author: Exergy ∞ LLC
description: Entity shard: one appraisal API call (provider + model) per prompt; parallel invocations per prompt_id.

entities.name: prompt_invocation
entities.brief: Parallel model/provider target for a prompt template.
entities.description: Nested under prompt.prompt_invocations in xframe/data/prompts/<prompt_id>.json. All enabled invocations for a prompt run in parallel. Set enabled false to skip a row without deleting it. Exactly one enabled row per prompt should have primary_for_listing true; that output is listings/<stem>.{txt|json}. Others are listings/<stem>__<invocation_id>.{txt|json}. If none are enabled, appraisal falls back to a single Gemini call using prompt.preferred_model.

fields.name: invocation_id
fields.description: Unique id (used in sidecar filenames); e.g. stamp_listing_openrouter.

fields.name: prompt_id
fields.description: Prompt template this invocation belongs to. Omit in nested source rows under prompt.prompt_invocations (implied by parent).

fields.name: provider_id
fields.description: Provider row (provider_id selects the appraisal client; see provider entity).

fields.name: model
fields.description: Model id for this provider (Gemini model id or OpenRouter model slug, e.g. openai/gpt-4o-mini).

fields.name: sort_order
fields.description: Stable ordering for logs and merge; lower runs first in listings.

fields.name: primary_for_listing
fields.description: If true, this invocation's output is the main listings/<stem> file the uploader polls.

fields.name: enabled
fields.description: If false, appraisal skips this invocation. When omitted, treated as true.
